compiled_state.title: RED: Add tests for _flock_stage_commit() helper extraction
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh to add tests that call _flock_stage_commit() directly. These tests should FAIL (RED) because the function does not exist yet.

Add test functions:
- test_flock_stage_commit_writes_file: Source ticket-lib.sh, call _flock_stage_commit(tracker_dir, staging_temp, final_path, commit_msg), assert file exists at final_path
- test_flock_stage_commit_commits_to_branch: Verify git log on orphan branch contains the commit message after _flock_stage_commit
- test_flock_stage_commit_fails_gracefully_on_missing_tracker: Call with invalid tracker_dir, assert non-zero exit without crash

Also include a regression test that write_commit_event still works after extraction.

## TDD Requirement

RED — Run only the 3 new test functions by name (test_flock_stage_commit_*) to confirm RED. Existing tests remain GREEN.

## Test Approach

Create a test fixture with an initialized .tickets-tracker/ worktree. Call _flock_stage_commit with valid args and assert: (a) file appears at final_path, (b) git log entry contains commit msg, (c) function returns exit 0. Test missing tracker_dir returns non-zero.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh
- [ ] 3+ new test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c "test_flock_stage_commit" tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Tests call _flock_stage_commit directly
  Verify: grep -q "_flock_stage_commit" tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: read_first gate — ticket-lib.sh (299 lines) and test-ticket-lib.sh (438 lines) read. Understood write_commit_event() structure: validates tracker, extracts metadata, stages temp file, acquires flock, atomic rename + git add + commit. Tests use _make_test_repo, _make_event_json helpers, assert.sh and git-fixtures.sh libs.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written and RED confirmed. 3 new test functions (test_flock_stage_commit_writes_file, test_flock_stage_commit_commits_to_branch, test_flock_stage_commit_fails_gracefully_on_missing_tracker) all fail with '_flock_stage_commit function exists: expected=defined actual=undefined'. Regression test (test_write_commit_event_regression_after_extraction) passes. Existing 8 tests remain GREEN. Total: PASSED 21, FAILED 3.
comments.author: Main
